data.scene: User opens the main app screen; the WebView loads the Home Assistant frontend.
data.purpose: Display the smart home control panel for monitoring and controlling devices.
data.source: Home Assistant server (frontend resources loaded via WebView)
data.item: WebView cookies, session data, cached page resources
data.frequency: Every time the app is opened
data.storage: WebView cookies and cache stored locally on device via CookieManager and WebView cache
data.thirdparty: Frontend content comes from the user's self-hosted Home Assistant server; third-party cookies accepted for embedded cross-origin content in frontend integrations
data.switchpath: N/A (dashboard is the main app screen)
